overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk waterfront promenade at night in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks along a wet concrete path lined with palm trees, digital billboards, and modern buildings, passing pedestrians and viewing the moon over the water before turning toward an urban plaza.

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade past coin-operated viewing telescopes and benches

entered.detail: coin-operated binocular viewer on concrete pedestal for viewing the water
metal safety railing along the edge of the promenade overlooking water
weathered wooden bench facing the waterfront
tall metal pole with base fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet concrete waterfront promenade at night. The camera moves forward past coin-operated viewing telescopes and wooden benches, with a metal railing separating the path from the dark water. The area is quiet and empty, with distant palm trees and billboards visible ahead.

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing passes close to camera on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade toward a large digital billboard, passing under street lamps

notable_agents.action: person in dark jacket walking past the camera toward the waterfront railing

entered.detail: tall palm tree trunk with textured bark and fronds silhouetted against sky
large illuminated digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements
tall modern street lamp casting bright light on the wet pavement
illuminated digital kiosk with glowing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The path continues past palm trees and illuminated street lamps. A large digital billboard dominates the right side, casting colored light on the wet ground. A pedestrian passes by on the left, and modern buildings become visible in the distance on the right.

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the full moon in the night sky
camera turns around 180 degrees to face the city buildings

agents.ego_description: approaching a person in red pants, then looking up at the moon and turning around to face the city

notable_agents.action: person in red pants and white striped shirt gesturing with arms raised near the railing
person in dark clothing standing near the waterfront railing

entered.detail: bright full moon visible in the cloudy night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a person in distinctive red pants who is gesturing toward the water. The view opens up to reveal the moon in the sky, prompting the camera to look upward. The camera then turns around, shifting the perspective from the water to the illuminated city buildings behind.

events.description: moving from waterfront promenade into open urban plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the illuminated modern buildings and scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red pants walking ahead toward the buildings

entered.detail: large multi-story building with illuminated windows and neon signage
wide open paved plaza with large concrete tiles
large leafy tree with thick trunk in the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open urban plaza surrounded by towering modern buildings with bright neon signage. The camera moves across the wide paved area toward the illuminated structures, with the digital billboard now visible in the distance behind. The atmosphere shifts from the intimate waterfront to the expansive cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a quiet waterfront promenade that gradually opens into an expansive, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins by gliding past coin-operated telescopes and wooden benches on a wet concrete path, moving toward distant palm trees and glowing billboards. As the camera progresses, the lighting shifts as a large digital billboard casts vibrant colors across the ground and a lone pedestrian passes by. The perspective then shifts upward to reveal the moon over the dark water after encountering a person in red pants, before turning away from the coast to face the city. Finally, the scene expands into a wide paved plaza surrounded by towering modern buildings and bright neon signage, leaving the intimate waterfront behind for the scale of the cyberpunk cityscape.
